description_long: This hamburger features a thick, juicy beef patty topped with a slice of melted cheddar cheese, crispy strips of bacon, and a sunny-side-up fried egg. The toppings are generously layered, with the bacon and egg draping over the sides, and a few slices of green jalapeño peppers peeking out from beneath the cheese. The bun is plain and lightly toasted, with a soft, golden-brown appearance and no visible sesame seeds. The hamburger sits on a white napkin, with some grease stains visible around its base. The overall presentation is hearty and indulgent, with the toppings arranged in a slightly uneven, rustic fashion.
description: A hearty hamburger with a beef patty, melted cheddar cheese, bacon, fried egg, and jalapeño slices on a plain toasted bun, presented on a napkin.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fried egg and bacon prominently draped over the patty, with jalapeño slices and melted cheese visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick bacon strips extending outward and the full fried egg covering most of the patty.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the egg's yolk and bacon, with less cheese and jalapeño visible, and the patty's edge exposed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows more bacon and jalapeño slices, with the egg slightly off-center and cheese less visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: The fried egg sits atop the bacon and cheese, with bacon strips and jalapeño slices unevenly distributed and some toppings extending over the bun's edge.
